meta.poznamky: start_blocks_xml: žebřík s repeat 3 { forward(30) left(90) penUp right(90) } — student doplní penDown + backward(40) mezi left a penUp.

cms.task_text: Žebřík má dvě tyče, ale [hlp]chybí příčle[/hlp]. Přidejte příčel: penDown, backward(40) za otočením doleva.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
